response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, with exposure to high-throughput services at Sociomantic and pricing optimization at Optilyz. However, the resume lacks direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing infrastructure, or telemetry/metrics systems at scale — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Seniority level (Senior/Staff) and demonstrated cross-team platform leadership also appear below the IC6 bar required.
strengths: Polyglot engineer with production experience in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) with demonstrated mentorship via workshops, courses, and open source
Experience with low-latency, high-volume services (millions of req/sec at Sociomantic) and AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq
concerns: No explicit experience building experimentation frameworks, feature flagging systems, or A/B testing platforms — central to this role
Limited evidence of telemetry/metrics infrastructure, statistical analysis, or bias detection work required for growth experimentation
Title progression (Senior/Staff) and scope of platform-level cross-team influence appear below Principal IC6 expectations
